response.justification: The candidate significantly exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of professional experience, including recent full-stack work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, plus current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience, which directly matches a rare requirement in this role. A strong testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks, Selenium courses) and demonstrated architecture ownership fit the seniority level. Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience, and Kotlin is absent (though Java is present).
strengths: Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple senior roles
Current AI-agent development and MCP tooling experience, matching a key requirement
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, authored testing libraries)
concerns: Kotlin not listed; Java exposure appears limited to older projects
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not explicitly named despite strong general testing background
